title: linaria flava subsp. oligantha
intro: Linaria flava subsp. oligantha, also known as the dwarf toadflax or small toadflax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Linaria flava subsp. oligantha include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Linaria flava subsp. oligantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
